title: Gouinia paraguayensis
taxonomy: Gouinia paraguayensis is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is classified in the tribe Paniceae and the genus Gouinia. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and genetic relationships with other grass species. Gouinia paraguayensis is native to the Americas, specifically in the tropical regions of South America. The classification of Gouinia paraguayensis is still a subject of ongoing research and study in the field of botany.
